intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: Social Media Growth Strategy for Beginners. Start with one primary platform, a simple content cadence, and metrics that match your goal. Depth beats scattered posting across every network.
mainSummary: Start with one primary platform, a simple content cadence, and metrics that match your goal. Depth beats scattered posting across every network.
keyTakeaways: One platform done well beats five done poorly
